strengths: 6+ years fullstack with TypeScript/Node.js across multiple senior roles
Current AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing discipline (TDD, Selenium courses, custom test runner) aligned with Vitest/Jest expectations
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
No mention of Kotlin; Java exposure is limited and dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018)
React experience present but not deeply detailed; cloud work skews AWS/Kubernetes without GCP/Azure breadth

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stated stack

response.justification: Candidate clearly meets the 6+ years fullstack bar with TypeScript/Node.js as primary tools at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq, and brings directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators at re:cinq) which matches a stated required skill. React is present (Optilyz) though less emphasized than backend. Testing expertise is a standout: TDD practice at RIDE, custom D test runner (Trial), and authored Selenium courses — transfers cleanly to Vitest. Gaps: Nest.js is not mentioned, Kotlin is absent, and Java is dated. Database experience covers MongoDB and SQL but no explicit PostgreSQL. Cloud/containerization is covered via AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes. On balance, strong primary-stack and AI-agent fit outweigh the framework-specific gaps, which are learnable for a senior engineer.
